zh.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfort是Sir Baldwin Mountfort和Joane De Vernon的兒子，於1427年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾。他於1455年與Joan Vernan在英國維爾爾厄普頓 斯達莫結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1479年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾庫可希爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfort是Sir Baldwin Mountfort和Joane De Vernon的儿子，于1427年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾。他于1455年与Joan Vernan在英国維爾爾厄普頓 斯達莫结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1479年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾庫可希爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mountfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mountford
meanings: English (Staffordshire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montfort-sur-Risle (Eure) or from one or other of various places called Montfort in France (from Old French mont ‘hill’ + fort ‘fortress’). Early forms of this name are indistinguishable from those of Mundford in Norfolk, perhaps indicating an alternative habitational name (see Munford ).

History: A Norman bearer of this name, from Montfort-sur-Risle in Eure, near Brionne, accompanied William the Conqueror in his invasion of England in 1066. Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl of Leicester, led a rebellion against Henry III (1216–1272).

nameMeanings.name: Bauldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfort was born in 1427, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Baldwin Mountfort and Joane De Vernon. He married Joan Vernan in 1455, in Upton Scudamore, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1479, in Cookshill, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfort est né en 1427, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir Baldwin Mountfort et Joane De Vernon. Il a épousé Joan Vernan en 1455, à Upton Scudamore, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1479, à Cookshill, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfort wurde 1427 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Sir Baldwin Mountfort und Joane De Vernon geboren. Er hat 1455 in Upton Scudamore, Wiltshire, England Joan Vernan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1479 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Cookshill, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfort è nato il nel 1427 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir Baldwin Mountfort e Joane De Vernon. Lui sposato Joan Vernan nel 1455, nel Upton Scudamore, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1479, nel Cookshill, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfortは1427年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでSir Baldwin MountfortとJoane De Vernonの息子として生まれた。1455年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアウプトン スクウダモーでJoan Vernanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1479年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアコオクシュイルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfort(은)는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Sir Baldwin Mountfort(와)과 Joane De Vernon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1455년 영국 윌츠히르 업턴 스c다모어에서 Joan Vernan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 쿡시에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele faleceu em 1479, em Cookshill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfort родился в 1427 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir Baldwin Mountfort и Joane De Vernon. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Vernan в 1455 г. в местности уптон скудамор, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1479 г. в местности кукшилл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Bauldwin Mountfort nació en 1427, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir Baldwin Mountfort y Joane De Vernon. Murió en 1479, en Cookshill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
